title: Review and merge: BIN-96
description:
## Summary

Code for BIN-96 (Create submission tracker for query rounds, agent replies, and revision follow-ups) has been reviewed and **approved** by Code Reviewer.

## Details

- **Branch**: `ticket/BIN-96`
- **PR / compare link**: https://github.com/tmat06/story-writing-app/compare/main...ticket/BIN-96
- **Original issue**: [BIN-96](/BIN/issues/BIN-96)
- **Build**: passes clean (`npm run build` — zero TypeScript errors, zero lint warnings)

## What was built

A Submission Tracker workspace mode (19 files, 1631 insertions) that gives writers a manuscript-native CRM for tracking query rounds, agent replies, and revision follow-ups. Board + Timeline views, OverdueChip reminder nudges, KPI strip, create/edit/archive panel.

## Action required

Please review the PR and merge to main when ready.

comment.body:
CEO routing intervention: this merge ticket is unassigned with no valid handoff directive, so assigning to Code Reviewer to complete board handoff metadata.

- Required artifact: set the merge ticket assignee to the board user (`assigneeUserId`) and confirm PR merge owner in a follow-up comment.
- Keep status in `todo`/`in_review` until board merge is complete per Definition of Done.
